text: Karnataka ELEVATE & KAN (Karnataka Accelerator Network) Purpose: Support startups with grants for prototype development and scaling. Eligibility: Startups registered in Karnataka, < 10 years old, innovative/scalable models (DeepTech, AI, etc.). Benefits: Grants up to ₹50 lakh per startup, mentorship, incubation, and VC networking. KAN specifically supports growth-stage startups. Application: Online via Startup Karnataka portal (https://startup.karnataka.gov.in/).

metadata.ministry: Dept. of Electronics, IT, BT and S&T

text: Karnataka Idea2PoC Grant Purpose: Support early-stage startups with funding to validate concepts (Proof of Concept). Eligibility: Early-stage startups in Karnataka; specific tracks for women (Elevate Women) and SC/ST founders (Elevate Unnati). Benefits: Grant-in-aid of ₹10–50 lakh for prototype/PoC stage. Application: Online via Startup Karnataka portal during open calls.

NEEDS (New Entrepreneur-cum-Enterprise Development Scheme) - Tamil Nadu Purpose: Assist first-generation entrepreneurs to set up new enterprises. Eligibility: Educated youth (degree/diploma/ITI) aged 21–35; first-generation entrepreneurs in Tamil Nadu. Benefits: 25% capital subsidy (up to ₹75 lakh) and 3% interest subvention on project cost. Application: Online via Tamil Nadu MSME/StartupTN portal (https://www.startuptn.in/).

StartupTN Seed Grant Fund - Tamil Nadu Purpose: Provide targeted funding for early-stage ideas to develop into viable businesses. Eligibility: Early-stage startups registered with StartupTN and recognized incubators. Benefits: Direct seed grants to help with PoC and early commercialization. Application: Register via StartupTN portal (https://www.startuptn.in/).

Tamil Nadu Micro Irrigation Project Purpose: Focus on water use efficiency via drip and sprinkler irrigation. Eligibility: Farmers in Tamil Nadu with Patta/Chitta land proof. Benefits: Up to 100% subsidy for small/marginal farmers and 75% for others to install micro-irrigation. Application: Via Uzhavan App or local District Agriculture Offices.

Savayava Bhagya Scheme - Karnataka Purpose: Promote organic farming and reduce chemical dependency. Eligibility: Farmers in Karnataka registered on the FRUITS portal. Benefits: 90% subsidy for setting up organic farming units and certification support. Application: Register via Karnataka FRUITS portal (https://fruits.karnataka.gov.in/).
